prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合科类最低位次分别为约4727名→5205名→7198名→12674名→16797名，呈持续后移趋势，近两年加速下滑，2024年较2023年后移约5476名，2025年较2024年后移约4123名，2025年基准位次约16797名；该校在山东省综合科类招生计划2021–2025年分别为67人、67人、68人、70人、73人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划75人，较2025年再增2人，扩招幅度约2.7%，对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 对外经济贸易大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，近年排名稳定在50–60名区间，属财经类顶尖院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第91位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等，财经类院校整体热度处于中游水平；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A、工商管理获评A、外国语言文学获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科，在财经类院校中实力突出，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温；法学评估为"分化观望"；计算机类评估为"推荐"但明显降温。山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（75人）对竞争略有缓和、山东省考生总数明显增加（+5.7%）推高竞争烈度，以及学校声誉平稳、财经类专业热度分化观望等多重因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准16797名基础上继续后移，预测最低位次约17273名，区间16773–17773名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 海关管理（海关与大数据应用拔尖人才实验班）
- 法学类（法学、可参与法学-大数据双学士学位项目或涉外型卓越经贸法律人才实验班选拔）
- 国际经济与贸易（国际组织人才基地班）（国际经济与贸易-法学双学士学位项目）
- 经济学（荣誉学士实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（国际经济与贸易、财政学、税收学）
- 工商管理类（会计学、财务管理、人力资源管理、市场营销、工商管理，可参与会计学与北邮计算机/金融科技联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 金融学类（金融学、金融学（国际金融与市场）、经济与金融、投资学、保险学）
- 经济统计学
- 金融工程（量化金融实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融工程（大类招生）（金融工程、金融科技，可参与金融科技与北邮人工智能联合学士学位项目选拔）
- 金融数学
- 数据科学与大数据技术（大类招生）（数据科学与大数据技术、智能科学与技术、人工智能（项目制培养），法学/保险-大数据双学士学位项目选拔）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（16773–17773名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（经济学类、工商管理类、金融学类），一档专业（海关管理、法学类、国际经济与贸易基地班、经济学实验班）作为冲刺，三档专业（金融工程大类、金融数学、数据科学大类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限则优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive subject category were approximately 4727 → 5205 → 7198 → 12674 → 16797, showing a continuous backward trend, with accelerated decline in the last two years. In 2024, it shifted back by about 5476 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it shifted back by about 4123 places compared to 2024, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at approximately 16797. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive subject category in Shandong Province from 2021 to 2025 was 67, 67, 68, 70, and 73 students respectively, with a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 75 students, an increase of 2 students from 2025, an expansion rate of about 2.7%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, making it a top-tier institution in finance and economics. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, and the overall heat of finance and economics institutions is at a mid-level. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A, Business Administration was rated A, and Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A-, totaling three A- and above disciplines, highlighting its strength among finance and economics institutions, which continues to attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with a slight warming compared to 2023. Law was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see'. Computer science was assessed as 'recommended' but significantly cooling. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) from 685,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the larger candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (75 students) which slightly eases competition, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province (+5.7%) which intensifies competition, and the stable reputation of the university with differentiated and wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift back from the 2025 baseline of 16797. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17273, with a range of 16773–17773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Customs Management (Customs and Big Data Application Top Talent Experimental Class)
- Law (Law, can participate in Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or Foreign-Related Excellent Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class selection)
- International Economics and Trade (International Organization Talent Base Class) (International Economics and Trade-Law Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Economics (Honors Bachelor's Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, can participate in Accounting and BUPT Computer/Financial Technology Joint Bachelor's Degree Program selection)
- Finance (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- Economic Statistics
- Financial Engineering (Quantitative Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Financial Engineering (Major Enrollment) (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology, can participate in Financial Technology and BUPT Artificial Intelligence Joint Bachelor's Degree Program selection)
- Financial Mathematics
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Major Enrollment) (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence (Project-Based Training), Law/Insurance-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program selection).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (16773–17773), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics, Business Administration, Finance) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Customs Management, Law, International Economics and Trade Base Class, Economics Experimental Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Financial Engineering Major, Financial Mathematics, Data Science Major) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range, prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
